name: Bean Soup II
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and sort through the lima beans. Cook in a pressure cooker until tender.
2. In a large skillet, sauté the onions and celery in oleo until they wilt.
3. Combine the cooked beans, sautéed vegetables, ham hocks, salt, pepper, lemon pepper seasoning, and Accent (optional) in a soup kettle with plenty of water.
4. Simmer for several hours, stirring occasionally, until thickened.
5. Serve with Mexican corn bread. This recipe freezes well.
